'''Tati''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DoN" /> located in the [[Bellassa system/Legends|Bellassa system]]<ref name="Email" /> of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Ferus Olin]] and [[Roan Lands]] once vacationed on the planet, where they found a tranquil waterfall-fed pool deep in the forest.<ref name="DoN" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]], co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', confirmed in [[March]] [[2023]] that Tati was located in the Bellassa system.<ref name="Email" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' {{1stm}}
